name: Mortrel
tagline: AI-native calendar for reflection and self-awareness
description: An AI-native calendar focused on reflection and self-awareness. Shipping end-to-end encryption June 2, 2026, with a blog post on signal coding; full UX release early August.

name: Stower
tagline: AI-native search across your Photos and Messages
description: AI-native search across your Photos and Messages, built in Swift. Turns your digital history into something actually navigable.

name: Kern
tagline: An infinite canvas for making connections
description: An infinite-canvas notes app — a thinking tool for making connections, not a vault for storing things.
